weeks.title: Shell Voicings & the Blues Scale
weeks.content: Introduction to 3rd and 7th shell voicings. C blues scale fingering. Left-hand comp pattern.
weeks.note: Good focus. Tempo steady at 72 bpm.

weeks.title: Rootless Voicings — Major ii–V–I
weeks.content: 4-note rootless voicings in C and F. Voice leading between chords. Hands-separate practice.
weeks.note: Voice leading clean but needs more evenness in right hand.

weeks.title: Cycle of Fourths Drill
weeks.content: Applying rootless voicings around the cycle of fourths. Metronome work at 60 bpm.
weeks.note: Excellent. Cycle clean through all 12 keys.

weeks.title: Minor ii–V–i & Half-Diminished Chords
weeks.content: Introduction to half-diminished quality. Minor ii–V–i voicings in A minor.

weeks.title: Quartal Voicings
weeks.content: Fourth-based chord structures. Applying quartal voicings over modal tunes.

weeks.title: Pre-Midterm Review
weeks.content: Full review of all voicing types. Run-through of midterm etude.

weeks.title: Upper Structures & Dominant Colors
content: Upper structure triads over dominant 7th chords
V7♯11 and V7♭9 voicings in context
Demo: In A Sentimental Mood two-handed arrangement

homework.label: Solo Piano Demo — In A Sentimental Mood

techniques: Rootless voicings — major and minor ii–V–I in all keys
Shell voicings at 80 bpm with metronome
Cycle of fourths drill — continuous, no stops

pieces.title: Autumn Leaves
pieces.note: A section from memory, full arrangement

transcription.title: Bill Evans — Peace Piece (opening 32 bars)
transcription.note: Transcribe and perform with own interpretation
